plan_meta.architecture: Foundation → Coverage → Retention → Prelims → Mains → Interview
plan_meta.notes: This is a advanced level, 6-month, 2h/day plan. Adjust based on actual exam dates.

Foundation.focus: NCERT foundation, basic concepts, study system setup

Coverage.focus: Complete GS 1-4 coverage, basic optional, essays starting

Retention.focus: Spaced revision, mind maps, PYQ practice, flashcards

Prelims.focus: Full MCQ practice, test series, CSAT, current affairs sprint

Mains.focus: Intensive answer writing, optional depth, essay writing

Consolidation.focus: Final revision, mock mains, gap analysis

strategy.mindset: Advanced stage – focus on mastery, not coverage. Quality over quantity. Own the answer writing.
strategy.note_making: Minimal notes – rely on strong conceptual understanding. Keyword sheets only.
strategy.resources_approach: Primary sources + Expert content + Original documents. Less reading, more integration.
strategy.current_affairs: Daily 15-60 min newspaper + monthly magazine compilation
burnout_prevention: Take one full day rest every 10 days if needed
No study after 10 PM for sleep quality
Celebrate small wins – topics completed, mock scores improving
strategy.week_1_to_2: Setup your study environment, gather all resources, set up notes system, begin Foundation phase
strategy.study_partner: Find 1-2 serious study partners for answer writing exchange and motivation

time_split_per_day.note: Adjust splits based on phase – more revision in Retention/Prelims, more answer writing in Mains

optional_subject_strategy.overview: Optional receives 10% of daily study time (12 min/day)
optional_subject_strategy.recommended_subject: Public Administration (if no specific choice) – best GS overlap
optional_subject_strategy.phase_for_this_plan: Complete coverage – all topics + basic answer writing

3_month_plan.goal: Complete syllabus overview, identify high-yield topics

12_month_plan.goal: Complete coverage + Revision + Test series enrollment
12_month_plan.deliverable: Full notes + 50+ answer writings + 2 mock tests

24_month_plan.deliverable: Expert-level notes + 100+ answer writings + Full test series

optional_revision_plan.pre_mains: Complete subject revision in 2 weeks + 5 mock tests

essay_framework.overview: Structured essay system integrating reading, brainstorming, writing and evaluation across the preparation timeline.

quote_bank: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar on constitutional morality

evaluation_framework.body_paragraphs: Thematic organization with evidence, examples, data (700-800 words)
evaluation_framework.conclusion: Synthesis + Future outlook + Balanced view (150-200 words)

revision_system.essay_portfolio: Maintain all written essays for self-review
revision_system.peer_review: Exchange essays with study partner monthly

ethics_framework.overview: Ethics moved to early stage – begins in Month 1. Deeply integrated with answer writing.

thinker_database.model_answer_use: Cases involving character dilemmas, leadership ethics

thinker_database.civil_service_application: Following rules regardless of consequences; no corruption even under pressure
thinker_database.model_answer_use: Cases involving bribery, rule-breaking for 'good' outcomes
Resource allocation, public health, infrastructure decisions

thinker_database.civil_service_application: Non-violent resistance to injustice; public resources as trust
thinker_database.model_answer_use: Whistleblower cases, civil disobedience, public resource management

thinker_database.civil_service_application: Affirmative action, inclusive governance, fighting discrimination
thinker_database.model_answer_use: Reservation policy, caste discrimination, tribal rights

thinker_database.civil_service_application: Designing equitable policies; prioritizing the worst-off
thinker_database.model_answer_use: Welfare program design, taxation, healthcare access

approach.step_2: Map ethical dimensions (rights, duties, consequences, virtues)
approach.step_5: Choose best option with ethical justification

personal_ethics_examples.purpose: Prepare 10-15 personal ethical dilemma experiences for Interview & Mains
categories: Time when you stood for truth despite personal loss
Disagreement with authority for righteous reason

revision_cycles.activity: Review 2 thinkers + 3 case studies + revise key terms
Full ethics paper revision in 1 week + 10 mock case studies

current_affairs_engine.overview: Systematic current affairs tracking linked to static GS topics

note_making_system.format: Topic → Background → Recent Development → Government Response → Significance → Critique → Way Forward
note_making_system.tools: Physical notebook or Notion/Obsidian for digital
note_making_system.link_to_gs: Tag each note with GS1/GS2/GS3/GS4 and specific sub-topic

monthly_revision.week_4_activity: Compile monthly current affairs digest – 20 key issues
monthly_revision.link_to_pyq: Check if similar current affair appeared in past Prelims/Mains

issue_mapping.purpose: Link current events to static syllabus topics
issue_mapping.example: New trade data → Economy chapter on BoP → IR chapter on bilateral trade
issue_mapping.monthly_exercise: Create 10 issue maps per month connecting CA to GS syllabus

revision_engine.overview: Spaced repetition-based revision covering all subjects at multiple intervals

1_day_revision.activity: Re-read key points, highlight important facts, check keywords
1_day_revision.method: Flash recall – close notes, write key points from memory

7_day_revision.trigger: Every Sunday for the week's topics
7_day_revision.activity: Mind map of week's topics, attempt 10 PYQs, fill flashcards

30_day_revision.activity: Full subject revision, attempt mini mock (30 MCQs), answer writing (2 mains answers)

90_day_revision.activity: Complete GS revision marathon – all 4 papers in 1 week
90_day_revision.method: Short notes compilation + Full mock test

revision_tools: Anki flashcards (digital) for facts, dates, schemes
Audio recordings for revision during commute

subject_revision_cycle.monthly_focus: Deep revision of 1 subject per month (rotation)
subject_revision_cycle.weekly_touchpoint: 15 min daily revision of previous week's topics
subject_revision_cycle.pre_mains_sprint: Full GS 1-4 + Optional revision in 6 weeks

answer_writing_engine.overview: Structured progression from 1 answer/week to daily practice, covering GS, Essay, Ethics and Case Studies

20_mark.structure: Intro + comprehensive body with subheadings + conclusion

ethics_case_studies.structure: Stakeholder analysis + Ethical dimensions + Options + Best option + Values upheld

quality_framework.keyword_tracking: Underline domain-specific keywords in every answer
quality_framework.peer_review: Exchange 2 answers per week with peer or test series

time_bound_practice.recording_baseline: Keep all written answers for tracking improvement

interview_preparation.overview: Basic awareness phase – no detailed interview prep at this stage
activities: Understand UPSC Interview format and DAF
Note current affairs for potential PI topics

ai_adaptive_architecture.overview: This plan is designed for deployment in Telegram Bot, Mobile App, and AI Mentor platforms

mission_format.morning_brief: Today's topic, time target, and motivation quote
mission_format.midday_checkin: Have you started? Quick progress check

adaptive_features.weak_area_detection: Track subjects where MCQ accuracy < 60% for 3 consecutive tests → flag for extra revision
adaptive_features.revision_reminders: Auto-reminder on day 3, 7, 30 after topic completion based on Ebbinghaus curve

missed_day_recovery.1_day_missed: Reduce tomorrow's topic + add missed topic to end of week
missed_day_recovery.3_days_missed: Compress syllabus – skip low-priority topics + double revision
missed_day_recovery.7_days_missed: Trigger adaptive replan notification + reduce timeline expectations

ai_coaching_triggers: Score below 50% in mock → trigger subject deep-dive
No answer writing in 14 days → prompt writing challenge
Streak broken → motivational message + easier task

readiness_prediction.model: Competency scores × Coverage % × Mock performance = Readiness %

burnout_detection.recovery_plan: 3-day lighter schedule with focus on enjoyable topics + physical activity

bot_fields.notification_schedule: 9 AM brief, 2 PM check-in, 8 PM review, 10 PM tomorrow preview

competency_model.philosophy: Shift from coverage-focused to mastery-focused preparation
